title: Software Update - DFU - Entering airplane mode during update
scenario: Verify that entering airplane mode during a DFU update causes a "Houston..." error, and that turning off airplane mode and clicking "Retry" successfully restarts and completes the update.
steps: Put mobile device into airplane mode during 0-20% (or 0-10% if updating headset and charge case/stand simultaneously).
expected: After some time, the update should fail and a "Houston..." error page should be displayed. After turning off airplane mode and clicking "Retry", the update should restart and finish successfully.
